name: GIMP MCP Server
what_it_does: GIMP MCP server enabling AI agents to control GIMP (GNU Image Manipulation Program) — applying filters and effects, editing image layers, performing color corrections, resizing and cropping images, running Script-Fu automation, and integrating AI-driven image processing into creative and production workflows. Requires GIMP running locally.
use_cases: Applying automated image corrections (brightness, contrast, color balance) from photo processing agents
Batch processing images with consistent filters from production pipeline agents
Removing backgrounds and creating composites from design agents
Applying artistic filters and effects to images from creative agents
Resizing and optimizing images for web publishing from content management agents
Automating repetitive image editing tasks from production automation agents
not_for: Vector graphics editing (use Inkscape MCP for SVG/vector work)
Professional print-ready output (use Adobe Photoshop or specialized print tools)
Real-time video processing (GIMP is for static images)
best_when: A designer or content creator needs AI-assisted raster image editing using GIMP — automating repetitive edits, applying consistent filters, or processing batches of images through GIMP's powerful scripting interface.
avoid_when: You work with vector graphics, need professional print color management, or require real-time image processing.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with running GIMP instance via Script-Fu or plug-in interface. GIMP must be running. Local-only access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — GIMP and MCP server are free open source
pricing.notes: GIMP is free (GPL) and the MCP server is free. No costs.

performance.rate_limits: Local GIMP process — no external rate limits; image processing speed depends on image size

known_agent_gotchas: GIMP must be running in the foreground — headless/background GIMP requires special configuration
GIMP Script-Fu API is Scheme-based — complex operations require Script-Fu knowledge
Large image files (50MB+) can cause slow response or memory issues — test with representative files
GIMP plugin compatibility varies by GIMP version — test with specific installed version
Destructive edits in GIMP are not automatically undoable from outside — use 'Save As' not 'Save' to preserve originals
Community niche MCP — limited documentation; Script-Fu integration may require customization
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local GIMP process. No network calls. No credentials. Image files processed locally — originals preserved if using 'Export As'. Safe for confidential image processing work.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local GIMP. No network. No credentials. Use 'Export As' to preserve original images. Safe for local image processing.
